member.name: T:Intersect.Compression.AssetPacker
member.summary: Allows for packaging up assets and extracting them from packaged files.

member.name: P:Intersect.Compression.AssetPacker.PackageLocation
member.summary: The location given at the creation of this object defining where we can find our asset packs.

member.name: P:Intersect.Compression.AssetPacker.CachedPackages
member.summary: A list of all packages currently being cached.

member.name: P:Intersect.Compression.AssetPacker.FileList
member.summary: A list of all files contained within the asset packs.

member.name: M:Intersect.Compression.AssetPacker.#ctor(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Create a new instance of
member.param: The index file to load assets from.
The location to load asset packages from.

member.name: M:Intersect.Compression.AssetPacker.GetAsset(System.String)
member.summary: Retrieve an asset from the asset packages.
member.param: The asset to retrieve.
member.returns: Returns a containing the requested file.

member.name: M:Intersect.Compression.AssetPacker.Contains(System.String)
member.summary: Checks whether or not an asset is contained within the loaded index file. This check is case insensitive!
member.param: The file to look for.
member.returns: Returns whether or not the file was found in the loaded Asset Packs.

member.name: M:Intersect.Compression.AssetPacker.UpdateCache
member.summary: Updates our cache timers and disposes of items no longer within the caching time limit.

member.name: M:Intersect.Compression.AssetPacker.findAsset(System.String)
member.summary: Find the location of an item in our asset packs.
member.param: The asset file to locate.
member.returns: Returns a containing relevant information regarding the asset's location in our asset packages.

member.name: M:Intersect.Compression.AssetPacker.Dispose
member.summary: Disposes of all cached data in the cache.

member.name: M:Intersect.Compression.AssetPacker.PackageAssets(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Packages up assets according to our settings.
member.param: The directory to search for assets to package up in.
The filter to use when searching for assets to pack up.
The directory to place output assets packs and index files.
The filename for the index file.
The file prefix for each asset pack.
The file extension for each asset pack.
The maximum size in Megabytes of combined files to pack up in each asset pack.

member.name: P:Intersect.Console.InputEncoding
member.summary: Gets or sets the encoding the console uses to read input.
member.returns: The encoding used to read console input.
member.exception: The property value in a set operation is .
An error occurred during the execution of this operation.
Your application does not have permission to perform this operation.

member.name: P:Intersect.Console.OutputEncoding
member.summary: Gets or sets the encoding the console uses to write output.
member.returns: The encoding used to write console output.
member.exception: The property value in a set operation is .
An error occurred during the execution of this operation.
Your application does not have permission to perform this operation.

member.name: M:Intersect.Console.Beep
member.summary: Plays the sound of a beep through the console speaker.
member.exception: This method was executed on a server, such as SQL Server, that does not permit access to a user interface.

member.name: M:Intersect.Console.Beep(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Plays the sound of a beep of a specified frequency and duration through the console speaker.
member.param: The frequency of the beep, ranging from 37 to 32767 hertz.
The duration of the beep measured in milliseconds.
member.exception: is less than 37 or more than 32767 hertz.-or- is less than or equal to zero.
This method was executed on a server, such as SQL Server, that does not permit access to the console.

member.name: P:Intersect.Console.KeyAvailable
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether a key press is available in the input stream.
member.returns: if a key press is available; otherwise, .
member.exception: Standard input is redirected to a file instead of the keyboard.

member.name: P:Intersect.Console.NumberLock
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the NUM LOCK keyboard toggle is turned on or turned off.
member.returns: if NUM LOCK is turned on; if NUM LOCK is turned off.

member.name: P:Intersect.Console.CapsLock
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the CAPS LOCK keyboard toggle is turned on or turned off.
member.returns: if CAPS LOCK is turned on; if CAPS LOCK is turned off.

member.name: P:Intersect.Console.TreatControlCAsInput
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the combination of the modifier key and console key (Ctrl+C) is treated as ordinary input or as an interruption that is handled by the operating system.
member.returns: if Ctrl+C is treated as ordinary input; otherwise, .
member.exception: Unable to get or set the input mode of the console input buffer.

member.name: E:Intersect.Console.CancelKeyPress
member.summary: Occurs when the modifier key (Ctrl) and either the console key (C) or the Break key are pressed simultaneously (Ctrl+C or Ctrl+Break).

member.name: M:Intersect.Console.Read
member.summary: Reads the next character from the standard input stream.
member.returns: The next character from the input stream, or negative one (-1) if there are currently no more characters to be read.

member.name: M:Intersect.Console.ReadLine
member.summary: Reads the next line of characters from the standard input stream.
member.returns: The next line of characters from the input stream, or if no more lines are available.
member.exception: There is insufficient memory to allocate a buffer for the returned string.
The number of characters in the next line of characters is greater than .

member.name: M:Intersect.Console.WriteLine
member.summary: Writes the current line terminator to the standard output stream.

member.name: M:Intersect.Console.WriteLine(System.String,System.Object[])
member.summary: Writes the text representation of the specified array of objects, followed by the current line terminator, to the standard output stream using the specified format information.
member.param: A composite format string (see Remarks).
An array of objects to write using .
member.exception: The format specification in is invalid.

member.name: M:Intersect.Console.WriteLine(System.Char[])
member.summary: Writes the specified array of Unicode characters, followed by the current line terminator, to the standard output stream.
member.param: A Unicode character array.

member.summary: Writes the specified subarray of Unicode characters, followed by the current line terminator, to the standard output stream.
member.param: An array of Unicode characters.
The starting position in .
The number of characters to write.
member.exception: plus specify a position that is not within .

member.summary: Writes the text representation of the specified Boolean value, followed by the current line terminator, to the standard output stream.
member.param: The value to write.

member.param: The value to write.

member.param: The value to write.

member.summary: Writes the text representation of the specified double-precision floating-point value, followed by the current line terminator, to the standard output stream.
member.param: The value to write.

member.summary: Writes the text representation of the specified single-precision floating-point value, followed by the current line terminator, to the standard output stream.

member.summary: Discover plugins for the current in the specified directories. Note: Yes, the exists with , but exists here because adds a "built-in" directory that is scanned regardless of the command line options.

the directories to scan for plugins in
member.returns: of plugins, keyed by

the directory to scan for plugins in

member.name: M:Intersect.Plugins.Loaders.PluginLoader.IsPluginEntryType(System.Type)
member.summary: The plugin entry type is defined as follows: - Is completely defined (not abstract, not generic, not an interface) - Implements (or , a sub-interface) - Has a default constructor (optional parameters are not a default constructor!)
member.param: the to check
member.returns: if is a valid plugin entry type

member.name: T:Intersect.Properties.DeveloperStrings
member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.name: P:Intersect.Properties.DeveloperStrings.ResourceManager
member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: P:Intersect.Properties.DeveloperStrings.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

member.name: P:Intersect.Properties.DeveloperStrings.ApplicationContextExited
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Application context exited..

member.name: P:Intersect.Properties.DeveloperStrings.ServiceLifecycleFailureExceptionUnknknownServiceName
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to UnknownService.

member.name: T:Intersect.Properties.ExceptionMessages
member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.name: P:Intersect.Properties.ExceptionMessages.ResourceManager
member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: P:Intersect.Properties.ExceptionMessages.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

member.name: P:Intersect.Properties.ExceptionMessages.FoundPluginEntryTypeMissingDefaultConstructor
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Plugin entry type found in the assembly does not have a generic constructor..

member.name: P:Intersect.Properties.ExceptionMessages.MissingPluginAssembly
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to No plugin assembly was found for the provided path..

member.name: P:Intersect.Properties.ExceptionMessages.MissingPluginEntryExceptionAssemblyName
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Unable to find a plugin entry type in:.

member.name: P:Intersect.Properties.ExceptionMessages.MissingPluginEntryExceptionDefault
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Unable to find a plugin entry type in the assembly..

member.name: P:Intersect.Properties.ExceptionMessages.PluginBootstrapContextMissingPluginArgument
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to PluginBootstrap factory needs at lease one non-null argument of type '{0}'..

member.name: P:Intersect.Properties.ExceptionMessages.SwallowingExceptionFrom
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Swallowing unexpected exception from {0}..

member.name: P:Intersect.Properties.ExceptionMessages.SwallowingExceptionFromWithQualifiedName
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Swallowing unexpected exception from {0}.{1}..

a function to filter subtypes with
the arguments to create the instance with

member.name: F:Intersect.Security.ApiVisibility.Public
member.summary: Anyone has access.

member.name: F:Intersect.Security.ApiVisibility.Restricted
member.summary: Privileged users have access.

member.name: F:Intersect.Security.ApiVisibility.Private
member.summary: Data owners have access.

member.name: F:Intersect.Security.ApiVisibility.Hidden
member.summary: No users have access.

member.name: T:Intersect.SuppressionJustifications
member.summary: Collection of commonly used justifications for suppressing code analysis warnings.

member.name: F:Intersect.SuppressionJustifications.NotNullJetBrains
member.summary: Analyzer doesn't respect JetBrains NotNullAttribute which already asserts non-nullability.

member.name: M:Intersect.Utilities.GuidUtils.CreateNamed(System.Guid,System.Byte[])
member.summary: Version 5 UUID implementation of RFC 4122 §4.3.
member.param: the UUID of the namespace
the name to generate the UUID for
member.returns: a Version 5 UUID generated from the provided namespace UUID and text name

member.name: M:Intersect.Utilities.Randomization.Next
member.summary: Returns a non-negative random integer.
member.returns: A 32-bit signed integer that is greater than or equal to 0 and less than .

member.name: M:Intersect.Utilities.Randomization.Next(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns a random integer that is within a specified range.
member.param: The inclusive lower bound of the random number returned.
The exclusive upper bound of the random number returned. must be greater than or equal to .
member.returns: A 32-bit signed integer greater than or equal to and less than ; that is, the range of return values includes but not . If equals , is returned.

member.name: M:Intersect.Utilities.Randomization.Next(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns a non-negative random integer that is less than the specified maximum.
member.param: The exclusive upper bound of the random number to be generated. must be greater than or equal to 0.
member.returns: A 32-bit signed integer that is greater than or equal to 0, and less than ; that is, the range of return values ordinarily includes 0 but not . However, if equals 0, is returned.

member.name: M:Intersect.Utilities.Randomization.NextBytes(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Fills the elements of a specified array of bytes with random numbers.
member.param: An array of bytes to contain random numbers.

member.name: M:Intersect.Utilities.Randomization.NextDirection
member.summary: Generates a random Direction using a synchronized random number generator.
member.returns: A Direction between Direction.None (inclusive) and the maximum available Direction (exclusive).

member.name: M:Intersect.Utilities.Randomization.NextDouble
member.summary: Returns a random floating-point number that is greater than or equal to 0.0, and less than 1.0.
member.returns: A double-precision floating point number that is greater than or equal to 0.0, and less than 1.0.

member.name: M:Intersect.Utilities.ValueUtils.ComputeHashCode(System.Object[])
member.summary: Computes the aggregate hash code for .
member.param: the set of values
member.returns: the aggregate hash code

member.name: M:Intersect.Utilities.ValueUtils.ComputeHashCode``1(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{``0})
member.summary: Computes the aggregate hash code for .
member.param: the enumerable set of values
member.returns: the aggregate hash code

member.name: M:Intersect.Utilities.ValueUtils.Compare(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String},System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String},System.StringComparison)
member.summary: Compares two if .
member.param: the mode to use
member.returns: the comparison between the two enumerables
